---
title: "Assignment 2"
format: html
editor: visual
---

These current chnages are made  in the main branch and the testbranch text is not shown currently.

The file after merging the testbranch with the main branch.
```{r}
df <- read.csv("data/36749257_Kishori Akola.csv")

# Create a simple histogram
hist(df$purchase_amount, 
     main="Distribution of Purchase Amounts", 
     xlab="Amount ($)", 
     col="skyblue")

```
